title: disperis zeylanica var. neilgherrensis
intro: Disperis zeylanica var. neilgherrensis, also known as the Neilgherries disperis, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to southern India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Disperis zeylanica var. neilgherrensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments.
